flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Culver-Stockton College rose 48% between 2006 and 2009 ($15.2k → $22.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Culver-Stockton College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (48.9% → 39.2%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Culver-Stockton College fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (41.5% → 35.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Culver-Stockton College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).
